repair_candidate.summary: Repair the existing #88180 contributor PR by refreshing its proof/readiness rather than replacing the code. The code patch is narrow and matches current-main behavior: add IDENTITY.md guidance beside SOUL.md/MEMORY.md guidance in src/agents/system-prompt.ts, with one focused regression test in src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(prompt): preserve IDENTITY defaults in system prompt
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair the existing contributor PR #88180 rather than replacing it.
- Preserve explicit IDENTITY.md expression defaults in the agent system prompt when IDENTITY.md is present.
- Keep the patch scoped to src/agents/system-prompt.ts and src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts.

## Contributor credit
Source PR: #88180 by @yozu / Yoshikazu Terashi. If Clownfish needs to open a replacement PR, carry that attribution in the PR body and squash message.

## Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts -t "adds IDENTITY guidance when an identity file is present|adds SOUL guidance when a soul file is present|adds MEMORY guidance when a memory file is present"
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

## Notes
The current worker could not run the tests because node_modules is missing and pnpm is unavailable in the checkout environment. The repair executor should hydrate dependencies, rerun the focused proof, and refresh the Real behavior proof/check before merge consideration.
validation_commands: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts -t "adds IDENTITY guidance when an identity file is present|adds SOUL guidance when a soul file is present|adds MEMORY guidance when a memory file is present"
